response.body_raw: {"choices":[{"finish_reason":"stop","index":0,"message":{"role":"assistant","content":"Leaves appear green because they reflect green light, which is a result of the chlorophyll within the leaves absorbing other wavelengths of light, primarily blue and red, for photosynthesis while reflecting green light back to our eyes."}}],"created":1784573373,"model":"Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct-GGUF:Q3_K_M","system_fingerprint":"b10050-b15ca938a","object":"chat.completion","usage":{"completion_tokens":46,"prompt_tokens":194,"total_tokens":240,"prompt_tokens_details":{"cached_tokens":67}},"id":"chatcmpl-BzOmdbgXPkZi7j1paYnNkcQYrIdwmPx0","timings":{"cache_n":67,"prompt_n":127,"prompt_ms":153.011,"prompt_per_token_ms":1.2048110236220473,"prompt_per_second":830.0056858657222,"predicted_n":46,"predicted_ms":623.052,"predicted_per_token_ms":13.544608695652174,"predicted_per_second":73.83011369837509}}
